title: No Item Rendering
description: Another one in my series of "why does this mod exist", this time it doesnt render any item. anywhere, empty inventory, empty groung etc
body:
Well here I am again with another "why the hell does this exist", this time it just doesnt render anything, empty inventory, whatever, wonder how it looks like? Download the mod!


Features:
Removes every item entity model. everything, like, it disables the rendering of items. Thats it.

Also join the [Discord!](https://discord.gg/p6ShJPq98d)
